entity.summary: Non-custodial decentralized derivatives and spot-trading protocol that launched an Arbitrum beta in February 2022, introduced ApeX Pro in November 2022, and shifted its primary product line to the multichain ApeX Omni platform in 2024 and 2025.
entity.notes: HEI treats CCXT's `apex` identifier, ApeX Pro, and ApeX Omni as one protocol-level entity. The sunset of ApeX Pro is modeled as a product transition rather than entity death because ApeX Omni remains active and continues the protocol identity.

events.title: ApeX Protocol beta launched on Arbitrum
events.description: ApeX Protocol opened its beta release on Arbitrum mainnet as a decentralized derivatives protocol.
events.notes: This is the earliest verified public protocol launch marker.

events.title: ApeX Pro launched on mainnet
events.description: ApeX launched its non-custodial order-book perpetual trading product ApeX Pro on mainnet.
events.notes: Recorded as a major product-generation launch within the continuing ApeX Protocol entity.

events.title: ApeX Omni launched
events.description: ApeX introduced Omni as its multichain liquidity and trading platform using a modular, intent-centric architecture.
events.notes: Omni became the successor product line for ApeX Pro.

events.title: ApeX Pro completed its primary trading sunset
events.description: ApeX removed the remaining Pro trading liquidity and disabled Pro deposit functions as users were directed to migrate to ApeX Omni.
events.notes: This event ended the Pro product generation, not the ApeX Protocol entity. Forced-withdrawal support continued afterward.

evidence.title: The ApeX Protocol Project
evidence.notes: First-party retrospective states that the beta launched on Arbitrum mainnet on February 28, 2022.

evidence.title: ApeX Protocol Announces Its Initial NFT Offering Plan
evidence.notes: Project-issued release independently preserves the February 28 Arbitrum beta date.

evidence.title: ApeX Pro Mainnet to Launch With 1,000,000 esAPEX Retroactive Airdrop
evidence.notes: First-party announcement gives November 21, 2022 as the public ApeX Pro mainnet date.

evidence.title: ApeX Pro to Launch on Mainnet With Year-Long Trade-to-Earn Rewards
evidence.notes: Project-issued release corroborates the November 21 mainnet launch.

evidence.title: Weekly Platform Updates
evidence.notes: First-party weekly update announces that ApeX Omni had officially launched.

evidence.title: ApeX Omni Strategic Roadmap Unveiled
evidence.notes: First-party retrospective states that Omni launched on June 16, 2024.

evidence.title: ApeX Pro Sunset: Delisting Timeline for Trading Pairs
evidence.notes: First-party schedule states that remaining market-maker liquidity and Pro deposit functions would end on April 14, 2025 while users migrated to Omni.

evidence.title: ApeX decentralized exchange and trading platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party site confirms continuing ApeX Omni operation and the protocol's active status.
